positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric pattern of a majestic, stylized mountain range combined with abstract celestial elements like crescent moons, starry constellations, and ethereal nebula clouds. The overall composition is symmetrical and centered, featuring clean, distinct silhouettes of mountains and astronomical glyphs. Use a limited, highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, sage green, and creamy off-white. The style should be vector art combined with sophisticated woodcut etching aesthetics, resulting in high contrast, clean lines, and crisp edges suitable for screen printing on textiles. The composition must be visually balanced and modular, filling the frame entirely.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, logo, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, photorealistic, excessive detail, gradients (except for nebula effects)
